title: European stocks soar after Iran keeps Strait of Hormuz open; travel stocks gain 5%
summary_full: European stocks rebounded sharply on Friday afternoon Iran said the Strait of Hormuz was open to commercial shipping.
summary_public: European stocks rebounded sharply on Friday afternoon Iran said the Strait of Hormuz was open to commercial shipping.
